subject: Audio plays on wrong output device after dock
description: Headphones expected; sound goes to laptop speakers or HDMI monitor after undock/redock.

ts_steps.title: Quick Settings output
ts_steps.action: Volume flyout → choose headphones or intended device.

ts_steps.title: Sound output page
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Sound → Output — select and Test.

ts_steps.title: Set default
ts_steps.action: mmsys.cpl Playback — Set as Default and Default Communication.

ts_steps.title: Show disabled devices
ts_steps.action: mmsys.cpl — enable all to see hidden endpoints.

ts_steps.title: Disable wrong default
ts_steps.action: Temporarily disable unused playback device to stop auto-switch.

ts_steps.title: Exclusive mode off
ts_steps.action: Device Properties → Advanced — uncheck exclusive control — test.

ts_steps.title: Dock undock cycle
ts_steps.action: Undock, wait, redock — observe default drift.

ts_steps.title: OEM audio driver
ts_steps.action: Update Realtek/OEM bundle from PC maker.

ts_steps.title: Teams devices
ts_steps.action: Teams → Settings → Devices — set speaker explicitly inside Teams.

internal_information: PnP reenumeration changes default; Teams has separate picker.
